commands.command: proof: override the zalo quote-metadata implementation has been verified with: 1. code-level proof showing extraction and surfacing of quote metadata 2. clean branch (+17 lines) matching issue #86851 proposed fix 3. keys align with existing inbound-meta.ts (replytoid, replytobody, replytoisquote) live zalo quote-reply proof requires a zalo account/environment not available in current worktree. request maintainer override to allow ci to verify.
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes package publishing to require multipart uploads, rejects public artifact metadata, splits public and server package publish schemas, and updates tests/docs/specs for that upload boundary.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main exports `publishPackage`, while PR head removes it and changes the public-action test to `publishRelease`; no runtime test was needed to establish that compatibility break.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can restore the public `publishPackage` alias and tests while preserving the intended multipart-only HTTP policy.

target.title: Require multipart package publishes
target.body:
## Summary

- Require `multipart/form-data` for `POST /api/v1/packages` and reject JSON package publish bodies before publish actions run.
- Keep package artifact metadata server-created by rejecting public `artifact` payloads and splitting public/server package publish schemas.
- Preserve multipart file and ClawPack publish paths, including documented `files[]` uploads, and update docs/spec coverage.

## Tests

- `bun run format:check`
- `bun run lint`
- `bun run test -- convex/httpApiV1.handlers.test.ts convex/packages.public.test.ts src/__tests__/plugins-publish-route.test.tsx packages/schema/src/schemas.test.ts`
- `bun run --cwd packages/clawhub test:src -- src/cli/commands/packages.test.ts src/cli/commands/publish.test.ts src/http.test.ts src/http.bun.test.ts`
- `bunx tsc -p packages/schema/tsconfig.json --noEmit`
- `bunx tsc -p packages/clawhub/tsconfig.json --noEmit`
- `bun run --cwd packages/schema build`
- `bun run --cwd packages/clawhub verify`

## Notes

- `bunx tsc --noEmit` was attempted. It is blocked locally by worktree dependency layout after restoring the missing declared `@faker-js/faker` package: Vite plugin types resolve from both this worktree and the sibling checkout `node_modules` path.
target.author: jesse-merhi
